title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repository providing a lightweight, extensible framework for running LLMs locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: Popular Python/JS framework with a dedicated Ollama integration for building LLM-powered applications.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, enabling browser and Node.js integrations.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, allowing easy LLM inference in Python scripts.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama, offering ChatGPT-like UI and admin tools.

title: continue
summary: VS Code extension that connects to Ollama for local code completion and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) example using Ollama and sentence-transformers.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Simple Python chatbot template leveraging Ollama for local conversational AI.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that interfaces with Ollama to provide LLM responses in Discord servers.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Collection of community-contributed tools and scripts for extending Ollama functionality.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama, enabling Slack workspaces to query local LLMs.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial npm CLI wrapper around Ollama for quick model pulls and prompts.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java client library for Ollama, bringing local LLMs to JVM applications.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style plugin for IntelliJ IDEs powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama, enabling C# developers to integrate local LLMs.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app providing a web UI and REST endpoints for Ollama model management.

title: ollama-node
summary: Lightweight Node.js wrapper around Ollama with TypeScript definitions.

title: ollama-kt
summary: Kotlin multiplatform client for Ollama, supporting JVM, Android, and native targets.
